description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from dark, weathered wood, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance suitable for urban environments. The front features five open shelves, each with a slightly irregular, slanted design, adding a modern and artistic flair. The sides are solid panels, fastened with visible metal rivets, enhancing its sturdy and robust look. The back panel is also solid, with some visible discoloration and marks, suggesting age or heavy use. The shelves are deep and spacious, capable of holding a variety of items such as books, tools, or decorative objects. The overall finish is matte with a rough texture, and the coloration is predominantly dark brown with hints of rust and wear.
description: A tall, dark wooden shelving unit with five slanted open shelves and solid, riveted sides, featuring a rugged, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open, slanted shelves and the deep, dark wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid, flat panel with visible rivets and no openings.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid back panel with discoloration and marks, and the shelf outlines faintly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid, riveted panel and no openings.
